text:
Health Centers | Contra Costa Health
Contra Costa Health provides quality outpatient health care services to our community, especially to vulnerable populations.
Our nine ambulatory care health centers offer a variety of patient-centered medical services to people with Medi-Cal and Contra Costa Health Plan members in convenient locations across the county. Services include:
Primary Care for People of All Ages
Geriatrics Care
Immunizations
Prenatal Care & Gynecology
Gender Clinic for Transgender & Non-Binary People
Laboratory Services
Please find a full list of services and contact information for each health center by viewing the map below.
